name: Green Apple
tagline: Clean air and open roads ahead
description: Crisp and invigorating, Green Apple transforms your cabin the moment you start the engine. A burst of orchard freshness cuts through city traffic and recalibrates your mood — turning the daily commute into something worth looking forward to. High-concentration formula that fills your car with clean, lasting freshness from the first drive to the last.

name: Strawberry Rose
tagline: Sweet and warm for the long way home
description: Sun-ripened strawberries meet velvety rose petals in a scent that turns your car into somewhere you want to linger. Warm and softly fruity, this blend is the olfactory equivalent of a golden afternoon drive with nowhere urgent to be. A long-lasting formula that fills your cabin with richness that evolves beautifully over hours.

name: Vanilla
description: Late nights, the city quieting down, leather seats and the soft glow of the dashboard. Vanilla wraps your cabin in creamy warmth — a scent so comforting it makes traffic bearable and every destination feel worth the journey. Madagascan vanilla settles into the air and stays there, long after you've parked.

name: Musk
tagline: The scent your car was always meant to wear
description: There's a scent that doesn't announce itself — it's just there, like the car was always supposed to smell this way. Clean white musk with subtle woody depth: sophisticated, unobtrusive, and exactly right for the driver who doesn't need to try. Fills the cabin with quiet confidence that holds all day, every drive.

name: Tea Rose
description: The long route through the hills on a Sunday. Tea Rose is delicate without being faint — a fresh floral that fills your car with a lightness that makes every destination feel earned. Heritage rose with soft green notes: the fragrance equivalent of windows down, somewhere beautiful ahead.

name: Honeysuckle
tagline: Summer evenings with the windows down
description: Golden hour. Windows down. The sweet, honey-like scent of honeysuckle drifting through the cabin, making you take the long way home just to stay in it a little longer. This luminous blend captures the warmth of a summer drive in its purest form — uplifting and effortless, from the first breath to the last turn.

name: Rose Geranium
tagline: Botanical depth for the thoughtful driver
description: Right after rain, the gardens are at their best — green and earthy and alive. Rose Geranium brings that botanical richness into your cabin: a complex, layered scent that reveals something new with every drive. For the driver who wants something more interesting than fresh and more refined than floral.

name: Forget Me Not
tagline: Light, lingering — every passenger will ask
description: The scent you can't quite place but never want to leave. Forget Me Not is the softest fragrance in the collection — whisper-light and ethereal, but with staying power that surprises. It fills the car with an almost weightless freshness that lingers long after you've parked. The ultimate signature scent for your vehicle.
